series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information regarding the records and affairs of entities as obtained and assembled by division examiners. Materials include division exam forms, examiner worksheets, entity financial records, and other documents obtained from the entity necessary to determine if any violation of O.R.C. 1707.01-99 has occurred.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area for 5 years from the date the exam was completed, or scanned and verified then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain securities machine readable records on database for a period of 5 years from the date the exam was completed, then destroy by erasure., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
